title: Worry Monster Plush
features: waste bin for the fears, troubles and woes
Worry monster loves to eat worries
Three designs, one supplied at random
description: Meet the worry monster who will save your child from thier worryes. When night falls, it's time for dreams. Nice, funny, sad or exciting dreams are fine, but being woken by a horrible nightmare is really upsetting. Fortunately for children, there are the Worry Eaters! Every night and every day they turn fears, worries or bad moods into nice stories to enjoy together or alone. Worry monster loves to eat worries - they are his favourite meal! Yum yum. Just make sure you take him with you wherever you go. The worry monster's motto is 'We eat your worries'. They are recommended by psychologists and teachers to act as a waste bin for the fears, troubles and woes that they don't always tell their parents about. Height: Approx. 35 cm Handwashable There are three different designs and these are randomly selected, so you will receive one of the three shown. Suitable for ages 3 years + Safety Information: Warning. Not suitable for Children under 3 years.
